Compliance.description: Registered dealer marketplace; ECT Act / CPA compliant; privacy policy covers POPIA-like data handling; no regulatory complaints found; operates since 1999.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.16/5 (31 reviews, NPS 37); mixed reviews on support; Google reviews mixed.

Product Value.description: Broad 2M+ listings with finance calculator; comparison tools; no guarantee/warranty as marketplace; good for browsing.

Innovation.description: Surf4Cars app (iOS/Android), auction features, dealer analytics, financing tools; 20+ year digital pioneer.

Customer Support.description: Mixed: HelloPeter avg NPS 37; some praise quick query responses, many complaints on fraud/scam dealers and unresponsive support.

Accessibility & Security.description: App-based and web access; POPIA-compliant privacy policy; no major breaches but marketplace fraud risk noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free browsing; dealer listings fees (private R99-199); wide vehicle range 2025/2026

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed HelloPeter; social complaints about fraud/fake listings; positive for selection/value browsing.
